public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as street cantor.
appearance: Roswen Velvetmere carries the marks of street cantor in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a street cantor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of street cantor in and around Ironspool Ward District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Ironspool Ward District while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Roswen Velvetmere can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Roswen Velvetmere needs help with a problem in Ironspool Ward District that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Roswen Velvetmere carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Ironspool Ward District, this lands inside a public field already shaped by local warders, repair guilds.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ironspool Ward District: the part of Ironspool Ward District where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break

first_impression: Roswen Velvetmere presents as Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a street cantor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Street Cantor, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
what_they_refuse: Roswen Velvetmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Street Cantor too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Roswen Velvetmere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Roswen Velvetmere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Roswen Velvetmere is Known locally through day-to-day work as street cantor. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Street Cantor.
social_texture: Roswen Velvetmere speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Ironspool Ward District, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Roswen touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Roswen Velvetmere when the party needs a socially grounded face for Ironspool Ward District: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
